hooks.prompt: If this Bash command does NOT contain 'gh pr create' or 'git push', reply with the single word 'PROCEED' and take no further action. If it DOES contain those, read .claude/hooks/pre-pr-gate.md and follow its checks before allowing the command. Block only if a gate check explicitly fails.

Check if .claude/cache/task-active.flag exists. If it does, read the task name from it, then read .claude/hooks/session-end-journal.md and follow its instructions to generate the journal. Do NOT do this if the flag does not exist or if a journal was already generated for this task.
